subject: A muscular humanoid figure in white and gold armor launches an energy attack, body surrounded by golden-white energy
suspected_ip: Angila (Dragon Ball Z: Cooler's Revenge — Armored Squadron)
description: A muscular humanoid figure in white and gold armor occupies the center of the frame in a wide action stance. The figure is launching or charging an energy attack, with a large golden-white energy burst erupting from the body's direction. The armor is elaborate, with sculpted pauldrons and a light-colored bodysuit beneath. The figure's face and head are distinct — not a standard human appearance, suggesting alien physiology, though specific features are partially obscured by the energy bloom. The background is consumed by the energy burst's radiance. The composition is a mid-shot emphasizing the armor and power release.
foreground: armored humanoid figure launching golden energy attack
background: golden-white energy burst filling the frame
emotion: aggressive confidence — wide stance, energy pouring outward
